channel.title: My garage - Tag - Yuri's Car Factory
channel.description: My garage - Tag - Yuri's Car Factory

item.title: My garage, #1
item.author: Popov Yuri
item.description: This is my garage on the shelf as of January 15th: Land Rover Defender, Toyota Hilux, and disassembled Unimog. On the top shelf is 42082 (Rough Terrain Crane) (stock version) - it is going to be rebuilt soon into a full RC MOD.
